jp.title: 日本の隣にあった「緑のウクライナ」なぜ消えた？ 絶たれた希望
jp.description: 4年以上にわたりロシアの侵攻を受けるウクライナ。 　日本とは遠く離れているが、かつて極東にウクライナ人の一大コミュニティーがあった。 　「緑のウクライナ」だ。 　隣国の日本とどのような関わりがあったのか。なぜこのコミュニティーは消えてしまったのか。知られざる歴史をたどる。

jp.title: 足利市大雨被害、市臨時記者会見の主な一問一答｜県内主要,地域の話題,社会,事件事故,＃D｜下野新聞デジタルニュース｜下野新聞デジタル
jp.description: 17日から18日未明にかけた記録的な大雨を受け、足利市は同日、市役所で臨時記者会見を開いた。早川尚秀市長や市職員が、災害対応の経緯や今後の被災者支援の方針などを説明した。主な一問一答は次の通り。　－被害まとめで、１人が救急搬送されたとある。　「40代女性がアンダーパスに車で進入してしまい、車両が水に漬かってしまった状態で救急を要請し搬送された。水に漬かったので体が寒くなって動けなくなっていたが、搬送時には歩行できる状態になった」　－小俣町の土砂崩れで住宅が倒壊した。

world.title: Australia news live: Liberal senator Andrew Bragg says he ‘strongly disagrees’ with Tony Abbott on multiculturalism
Ford says U.S. politicians criticizing Canadian wildfire response have 'a very short memory'
world.description: At a news conference in Thunder Bay on Saturday, Ontario Premier Doug Ford railed against U.S. politicians who’ve criticized Canadian wildfire suppression efforts, adding that many in the current administration have "a very short memory."

world.title: Kylian Mbappé breaks Lionel Messi’s World Cup scoring record with 22nd career goal
world.description: Kylian Mbappé’s second goal against England put him alone atop the World Cup record books with 22 career goals, surpassing Lionel Messi for the most in tournament history.

world.description: With the 2026 World Cup in full swing, it was only a matter of time before Argentina's Lionel Messi broke the all-time record.

world.title: Lionel Messi, Argentina chase repeat World Cup title against Spain
world.description: Lionel Messi and Argentina are vying to become the first team to defend a World Cup title since 1962 in the final against Spain.

world.title: Mercury is shrinking - as its iron core slowly cools, the whole planet has contracted by up to seven kilometres, wrinkling its surface into cliffs hundreds of miles long

world.title: Former Labour, National MPs explain their switch to NZ First
world.description: Former Ministers who have defected to New Zealand First say they did not leave their parties - their parties left them.

world.title: Bukayo Saka has hat trick for England in win vs. France
world.description: England forward Bukayo Saka scored his side's third, fourth and fifth goals against France in the third place game.

world.title: Mozilla warns: Period-tracking apps could expose sensitive health information
world.description: A Mozilla privacy study reveals wide gaps in period-tracking app security, with Euki scoring perfect and Stardust ranking last.
